product.title: Ogee Complexion Perfecting Liquid Foundation - Lightweight Tinted Moisturizer For Face (Linden 1.25N - Light Beige, Neutral Undertone) - with Vitamin C & Jojoba Oil - Certified Organic & Made in USA
featureBullets: Radiant Complexion: Experience a lightweight tinted moisturizer that provides customizable coverage, blending seamlessly for a radiant, natural finish.
Plant-Based Skin Support: Daisy Flower Extract enhances the skin’s natural glow and improves texture over time.
Superfruit Benefits: Infused with Raspberry Ketones and Gooseberry Juice to promote hydration and protect against environmental stressors.
Hydrating Jojoba Oil: Features American-grown Jojoba Oil, a non-comedogenic ingredient that nourishes skin without clogging pores.
Effortless Application: Designed for optimal results with Ogee’s Base Brush. Explore more luxurious cosmetics by searching "Ogee makeup."
product.description: This skincare-infused tinted moisturizer provides breathable, buildable coverage for a radiant, second-skin finish. Powered by natural Daisy Flower and brightening Vitamin C, it supports skin’s health and glow with every application. Hydrating Jojoba Oil ensures a smooth and nourishing experience. For best results, pair with Ogee’s Base Brush to complete your flawless look.

variants.title: Maple 8.25W - Medium Deep, Golden Bronze Undertones
Juniper 3.25W - Medium Light Tan, Bright-Golden Undertones

specification.value: #13,497 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #21 in Facial Tinted Moisturizers

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation provides good coverage that can be adjusted to personal preference, and appreciate its lightweight feel that doesn't feel heavy or cakey. The product receives positive feedback for its quality and appearance, with customers noting it stays on for a long time. The color match and dryness receive mixed reviews - while some praise the near-perfect natural skin tint, others find it doesn't match their shade, and while some say it feels clean on the skin, others report it looks dry. The fragrance receives negative feedback, with several customers describing it as bad-smelling.

reviews.reviewTitle: Natural, Radiant, and Skin-Loving – Perfect Tinted Moisturizer
reviews.reviewText: I am beyond impressed with the Ogee Complexion Perfecting Tinted Moisturizer! The lightweight formula feels amazing on my skin, providing just the right amount of coverage while still looking natural. The Birch shade is a perfect match for my fair skin with neutral undertones, blending seamlessly without any streaks. What truly sets this product apart is the nourishing formula. The added Vitamin C and jojoba oil leave my skin feeling hydrated and radiant all day. I also love that it’s certified organic and made in the USA—such a great bonus for a high-quality product. If you’re looking for a tinted moisturizer that perfects your complexion while caring for your skin, this is the one. Highly recommend!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 18, 2024

reviews.reviewText: I didn’t like this product at first but it really grew on me and now it’s my favorite. At first I noticed an unusual smell and the product didn’t mix when shaken. Then after a few times using it, those issues resolved. You just need to shake it every time you use it. It blends very well and actually works as skincare—I noticed less acne and my skin looked more hydrated so that I didn’t feel like I needed to wear any makeup after awhile. Overall this has given me healthier skin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 2, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Nice quality but the color are too intense Could be more sheer
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026

productSpecs.color: Juniper 3.25W - Medium Light Tan, Bright-Golden Undertones

reviews.reviewTitle: Beautiful, Clean Ingredient Foundation – Worth It for Healthy Skin!
reviews.reviewText: I’ve been searching for a clean, natural foundation and the Ogee Complexion Perfecting Liquid Foundation did not disappoint! It has organic, all-natural ingredients, which makes me feel so much better about what I’m putting on my skin every day. The coverage is light to medium, very buildable, and gives a natural, radiant finish—perfect for a healthy, "your-skin-but-better" look. I also love that it doesn’t feel heavy or cakey at all. There is a slight scent—probably from non-toxic ingredients that mask the smell with toxic fragrances —but it fades quickly and honestly, I don’t mind it. It’s a small trade-off for something that’s this gentle on the skin. Since switching, I’ve noticed fewer breakouts and my skin feels more balanced overall. If you're looking for a foundation that’s both clean and effective, this one is absolutely worth trying!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 31, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Best foundation for my 40 year old skin
reviews.reviewText: 40 years old and this is the best foundation for my dry, dull skin that I have tried. I’ve tried all the big brands, Ilia, IT, Tarte, Lancôme, you name it. This one is by far my favorite. I fee glowy, dewy, and natural. I love the ingredients too. It does have a minty smell or something faint but goes away very quickly once on.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 6, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Not at all what I had hoped for. The color does match so I’ll give it that. It goes on pretty thick even when applying the thinnest layer. It’s definitely full coverage. There’s a bit of a smell to it that I just can’t get use to. I can literally smell it on my face all day. My eyes tend to burn a bit aswell. I’m assuming it’s smell. It even feels a bit heavy and sticky, even after applying my setting powder.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 29, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I had moderate expectations for this as I have a hard time finding foundations I like. This is truly a beautiful product. The color matches my skin tone perfectly. It covers imperfections well and somehow manages to stay nice all day without reapplying. It does have a smell upon application as others have mentioned but it seems to go away after a few minutes. I am so happy to use something that works so well and also uses natural ingredients. Love this!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 29, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is a very light to medium coverage foundation. It feels so lightweight and blends very easily. I’ve found that it has fixed my hyper-pigmentation in less than 2 weeks and it keeps my skin hydrated. It’s excellent! I don’t use other foundations anymore.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 16, 2026
